title: Would you like to make a game?
summary: Start with a tiny playable canvas, change one idea, and send the first Kidzone pull request.
description: A tiny canvas game starter with a moving comet, collectible sparks, and obvious first pull request ideas.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only canvas play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help is useful for the first pull request or code edit.
safety.notes: Starter game encourages small, visible changes instead of passive scrolling.
